class.name: Commander
class.description: Soldier... Warrior... Fearless Leader. Among the most skilled soldiers in the world, Commanders are masters of every weapon and form of close combat.

progression.name: Coordinated Strike!
progression.description: Gain the Coordinated Strike! Commander's Order.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Commander's Orders
progression.description: Choose 2 Commander's Orders.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Field Medic
progression.description: Roll 1 additional die for any health potion you administer; allies may add your Examination bonus to HP recovered after treatment.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Choose a Commander subclass.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield
progression.description: Choose a Combat Tactic. Gain STR Combat Dice (d6) on initiative; spend 1/attack for maneuvers.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Rigorous Training
progression.description: During Safe Rest training, you may choose different Commander options available to you.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Master Commander
progression.description: On initiative, regain 1 spent use of Coordinated Strike for that encounter; Coordinated Strikes ignore disadvantage.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Combat Tactics
progression.description: Combat Dice become d8s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield (2)
progression.description: Choose another Combat Ability or gain +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Weapon Mastery
progression.description: Choose a weapon type to specialize in.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Commander subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield (3)
progression.description: Choose another Combat Ability or gain +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Master Commander (2)
progression.description: +1 use of Coordinated Strike/Safe Rest.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Combat Tactics (2)
progression.description: Combat Dice become d10s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield (4)
progression.description: Choose another Combat Ability or gain +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Weapon Mastery (2)
progression.description: Choose a 2nd weapon type to specialize in.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Commander subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield (5)
progression.description: Choose another Combat Ability or gain +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Master Commander (3)
progression.description: +1 use of Coordinated Strike/Safe Rest.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Combat Tactics (3)
progression.description: Combat Dice become d12s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Weapon Mastery (3)
progression.description: You have complete mastery of all weapon types.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Subclass
progression.description: Gain your Commander subclass feature.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Fit for Any Battlefield (6)
progression.description: Choose another Combat Ability or gain +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Key Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 STR or INT.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Master Commander (4)
progression.description: +1 use of Coordinated Strike/Safe Rest.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Combat Tactics (4)
progression.description: Combat Dice become d20s.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Secondary Stat Increase
progression.description: +1 DEX or WIL.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Take the stat that supports your core combat loop and your most frequent checks/attack scaling.

progression.name: Unparalleled Tactics
progression.description: First time each encounter you use Coordinated Strike, an ally who can hear you gains 1 action on their next turn.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Epic Boon
progression.description: Choose an Epic Boon (see pg. 23 of the GM's Guide).
progression.combatUsageNotes: Pick options that support your current build plan; favor synergy over isolated power.

progression.name: Captain of Legions
progression.description: +1 to any 2 stats; first Coordinated Strike each encounter gives every ally within 12 spaces +1 action (replaces Unparalleled Tactics).
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Armor Master
progression.description: You are proficient with plate armor.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

progression.name: Shield Expert
progression.description: While wearing a shield, Defend 2x each round; after fully blocking damage first time each round, make an opportunity attack for free.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Juggernaut
progression.description: When you use Coordinated Strike, deal extra damage equal to armor and add 1 to your primary die.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: Taunting Strike
progression.description: (1/turn) You may Taunt a creature you hit until the end of their next turn.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this to control enemy behavior and create safer turns for your team focus-fire. Budget around its 1/TURN limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: Shield Wall
progression.description: Allies within 2 spaces gain all benefits of the shield you have equipped.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

progression.name: Advance!
progression.description: (1/round) After moving toward an enemy, gain advantage on first melee attack against it; Coordinated Strike lets allies within 12 spaces move up to half speed for free first.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/ROUND limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

progression.name: Experienced Commander
progression.description: Your Coordinated Strike may target 1 additional ally; gain +1 use of Coordinated Strike/Safe Rest.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Track this resource every turn and spend it proactively instead of ending encounters with unused value.

progression.name: Survey the Battlefield
progression.description: When you roll initiative, regain 1 use of Coordinated Strike; +1 max Combat Dice.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

progression.name: As One!
progression.description: Coordinated Strike attacks also grant advantage and ignore all disadvantage; chosen allies gain 1 additional action next turn.
progression.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceGroups.name: Commander's Orders
choiceGroups.description: Commander order options refreshed by Rigorous Training.

choiceGroups.name: Combat Abilities
choiceGroups.description: Fit for Any Battlefield selectable maneuvers.

choiceOptions.name: Face Me!
choiceOptions.description: Reaction (after an ally is crit within 12 spaces): Taunt that enemy until you drop to 0 HP.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Hold the Line!
choiceOptions.description: (1/encounter) Reaction (when an ally drops to 0 HP): set their HP to 3x your LVL.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: I Can Do This ALL DAY!
choiceOptions.description: (1/encounter) Reaction (when you would drop to 0 HP): expend any number of Hit Dice and set HP to sum rolled.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value. Budget around its 1/ENCOUNTER limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Move it! Move it!
choiceOptions.description: On initiative, give yourself and an ally advantage on initiative and +3 speed for 1 round.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking.

choiceOptions.name: Reposition!
choiceOptions.description: Action/Reaction (on ally turn): command 1 ally to move up to speed or 2 allies up to half speed for free.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Commanding Presence
choiceOptions.description: Action: 2-word command; on failed WIL save (DC 10+STR), target obeys next turn and is then immune for 1 day.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Heavy Strike
choiceOptions.description: On hit, push target (size-scaled) and deal extra damage equal to Combat Die roll.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Inerrant Strike
choiceOptions.description: Reroll a miss, add +1 to Primary Die, and deal extra Combat Die damage.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Lunging Strike
choiceOptions.description: Gain +1 Reach and deal extra damage equal to 2x Combat Die roll.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Sweeping Strike
choiceOptions.description: 2 actions: attack contiguous area in reach and damage all targets; does not miss on 1.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Plan your action economy around this; use it on turns where its payoff beats a standard attack.

choiceOptions.name: Slashing
choiceOptions.description: Attacks with slashing weapons cannot miss unarmored enemies.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Bludgeoning
choiceOptions.description: On primary die 7+ with bludgeoning weapon, ignore Heavy Armor.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Piercing
choiceOptions.description: Attacks with piercing weapons ignore Medium Armor.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Armor Master
choiceOptions.description: You are proficient with plate armor.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Shield Expert
choiceOptions.description: While wearing a shield, Defend 2x each round and may counter after full block.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Treat this as a trigger-based tool: hold it until the stated condition happens, then fire it for swing value.

choiceOptions.name: Juggernaut
choiceOptions.description: Coordinated Strike adds armor-based damage and +1 primary die.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 7. Save this for enemy spike turns; it is strongest when it prevents a big tempo or survivability loss.

choiceOptions.name: Taunting Strike
choiceOptions.description: (1/turn) Taunt hit creature until end of its next turn.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 11. Use this to control enemy behavior and create safer turns for your team focus-fire. Budget around its 1/TURN limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Shield Wall
choiceOptions.description: Allies within 2 spaces gain shield benefits.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 15. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Advance!
choiceOptions.description: (1/round) Move-toward bonus attack advantage and allied half-speed move on Coordinated Strike.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 3. Use this for positioning: engage priority targets, escape danger, or set up advantage before attacking. Budget around its 1/ROUND limit so it lands in the highest-impact window.

choiceOptions.name: Experienced Commander
choiceOptions.description: Coordinated Strike targets +1 ally; +1 use/Safe Rest.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 7. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: Survey the Battlefield
choiceOptions.description: On initiative, regain 1 Coordinated Strike use; +1 max Combat Dice.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 11. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.

choiceOptions.name: As One!
choiceOptions.description: Coordinated Strike attacks grant advantage, ignore disadvantage, and allies gain +1 action next turn.
choiceOptions.combatUsageNotes: Unlocks at level 15. Use this in the rounds where its trigger/conditions are easiest to satisfy for reliable combat value.
